title: Economic complexity at subnational level: A consistency analysis
abstract: arXiv:2606.26966v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Several network-based measures have been proposed to assess the economic complexity of countries. These measures have provided important insights into national economic development, and they are now widely applied at the subnational level as well. Here, we show that such applications lead to inconsistent results, in the sense that the estimated complexity of the same product appears to depend on methodological details such as the geographical scale of analysis. Building on these findings, we propose a measure of territorial economic complexity based on an exogenous and extensive computation. We show that these methodological choices yield estimates that are more consistent and more strongly aligned with standard economic indicators, such as GDP per capita and employment.
context:
Title: Economic complexity at subnational level: A consistency analysis
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26966v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Several network-based measures have been proposed to assess the economic complexity of countries. These measures have provided important insights into national economic development, and they are now widely applied at the subnational level as well. Here, we show that such applications lead to inconsistent results, in the sense that the estimated complexity of the same product appears to depend on methodological details such as the geographical scale of analysis. Building on these findings, we propose a measure of territorial economic complexity based on an exogenous and extensive computation. We show that these methodological choices yield estimates that are more consistent and more strongly aligned with standard economic indicators, such as GDP per capita and employment.
translated_title: 地方层面的经济复杂性：一致性分析
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26966v1 公告类型：新 摘要：已有多种基于网络的方法被提出用于评估国家的经济复杂性。这些方法为国家经济发展提供了重要见解，并且现在也被广泛应用于地方层面。在此，我们表明此类应用会导致不一致的结果，即同一产品的估计复杂性似乎取决于分析的地理尺度等方法细节。基于这些发现，我们提出了一种基于外生且广泛计算的地域经济复杂性衡量方法。我们表明，这些方法选择产生的估计更一致，并且与人均GDP和就业等标准经济指标更紧密地一致。
tldr: 本研究指出将国家经济复杂性指标直接用于地方层面会产生不一致结果，并提出一种基于外生广泛计算的新方法，该方法能更一致地反映标准经济指标。
en_tdlr: This study reveals that applying national-level economic complexity measures to subnational levels yields inconsistent results, and proposes a new measure based on exogenous and extensive computation that aligns more consistently with standard economic indicators.
